verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the valley is deep When the mountain is steep When the body is weary When we stumble and fall

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the choices are hard When we're battered and scarred When we've spent our resources When we've given our all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In Jesus' Name we press on In Jesus' Name we press on Dear Lord, with the prize Clear before our eyes We find the strength to press on

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We have heard from our Lord The call of Malachi 4 Our hearts are rejoicing For what we have in store

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We are lonesome for home And the saints who've gone on To be changed in a moment And walk through heaven's door

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In Jesus' Name we press on In Jesus' Name we press on Dear Lord, with the prize Clear before our eyes We find the strength to press on
